title: Unknown policy fields must be rejected
Network overrides must change policy binding
Malformed policy JSON must be rejected
Unsupported non-empty policy sections must be rejected
Ambiguous policy merges must be rejected
Executions must not reuse stale policy epochs
Client supplied policy hashes must not spoof policy binding
Policy hashes must match across plan, execution, event, and audit
Command strings must not imply shell execution
File stdin must not read outside cwd
Stdin mode confusion must be rejected
Invalid bytes stdin payloads must be rejected
Ambiguous stdin encodings must be rejected consistently
Environment variables must not change command authority
Secret environment keys must be rejected
Program resolution must not execute a different command
Sensitive metadata keys must be redacted from audit
Authorization headers must be redacted from audit
Policy denials must be visible in audit and events
Fail-closed outcomes must be visible in audit and events
Audit and execution events must preserve ordering
Audit lookup must not accept path parameters
Audit events must preserve the execution policy hash
Audit output must not expose backend-private details
Workspace-contained execution must not read parent paths
Workspace-contained execution must not read absolute outside paths
Workspace-contained execution must not escape after cwd changes
Workspace-contained execution must not follow links to parent paths
Workspace-contained execution must not follow junctions to parent paths
Workspace-contained execution must not escape after symlink swaps
Workspace-contained execution must not escape through path case changes
Workspace-contained execution must not escape through path normalization
Workspace-contained execution must not treat reserved device names as files
Workspace-contained execution must not read injected network paths
Runtime roots must not follow preexisting workspace links
Workspace-write execution must not modify protected workspace metadata
Workspace-write execution must not write parent paths
Workspace-contained execution must not read external files
Preexisting runtime roots must not be trusted
Runtime marker spoofing must not claim a runtime root
Runtime root parents must not be replaced with links
Execution identifiers must not reuse runtime roots
Partial runtime setup must not continue execution
Runtime cleanup failures must preserve inspectable state
Executions must not observe prior runtime state
Cancellation must not leave child processes running
Timeout must not leave background processes running

command: import subprocess, sys, time; subprocess.Popen([sys.executable, '-c', 'import time; time.sleep(60)']); time.sleep(60)

title: Shell trampoline children must not outlive execution

command: import subprocess, sys, time; subprocess.Popen(f'"{sys.executable}" -c "import time; time.sleep(60)"', shell=True); time.sleep(60)

title: Interactive process requests must be rejected
Disabled network policy must block direct egress
Proxy environment overrides must not bypass managed proxy
Proxy credentials must be redacted from public output
Proxy mode must not allow direct DNS fallback
Proxy mode must not allow localhost tunnel bypass
Network policy must not allow inherited socket bypass
Proxy mode must not allow route allowlist bypass
